source_rationale: CD69 is a canonical early T cell activation marker expressed on the surface of recently activated lymphocytes
CXCR4 is a chemokine receptor upregulated upon T cell activation, mediating homing and migration
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine produced by activated T cells involved in immune cell recruitment
KLRB1 (CD161) is a C-type lectin receptor expressed on activated T cells and NK T cells
Granzyme B is a serine protease expressed by activated cytotoxic T cells and NK cells for target cell killing
IL7R (CD127) is expressed on activated T cells and is important for T cell survival and homeostasis
TFAP2B is a transcription factor essential for amacrine cell fate specification in the retina
TFAP2A is a key transcription factor required for amacrine and horizontal cell development in the retina
PAX6 is a master eye development transcription factor highly expressed in amacrine and other retinal interneurons
CARTPT (CART peptide) is a neuropeptide marker of specific amacrine cell subtypes in the retina
CELF4 is an RNA-binding protein enriched in neurons including retinal amacrine cells
MEG3 is a long non-coding RNA highly expressed in retinal neurons including amacrine cells
Von Willebrand factor is a canonical endothelial cell marker involved in hemostasis
DARC (ACKR1/Duffy antigen) is a chemokine receptor highly expressed on postcapillary venular endothelial cells
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor important for vascular development
TM4SF1 is a transmembrane protein enriched in endothelial cells involved in angiogenesis
RAMP3 modulates adrenomedullin signaling and is enriched in choroidal endothelial cells
STC1 (Stanniocalcin 1) is expressed in endothelial cells and involved in angiogenesis regulation
Alpha-crystallin A is a lens/ciliary body protein with chaperone function, highly expressed in ciliary epithelium
Beta-crystallin B2 is a structural protein characteristic of lens and ciliary body epithelial cells
Alpha-crystallin B is a small heat shock protein highly expressed in ciliary body epithelium
Aquaporin 1 is a water channel critical for aqueous humor production in the ciliary body
CXCL14 is a chemokine enriched in ciliary body epithelium
Sarcolipin is a calcium regulatory protein expressed in ciliary body cells
Claudin 5 is a tight junction protein and canonical marker of vascular endothelial cells
Von Willebrand factor is a well-established endothelial cell marker
TM4SF1 is enriched in endothelial cells and involved in vascular biology
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific gene important for vascular tube formation
SPARCL1 (hevin) is a matricellular protein enriched in endothelial cells
COL9A1 is the defining collagen gene for this ciliary body cell subtype
CPAMD8 is associated with anterior segment development and is mutated in anterior segment dysgenesis
COL9A2 is a collagen IX component co-expressed with COL9A1 in this ciliary body subtype
TRPM3 is a cation channel expressed in ciliary body and involved in ocular physiology
DAPL1 is a death-associated protein enriched in pigmented epithelial cells of the eye
PDE6H encodes the cone-specific phosphodiesterase gamma subunit essential for cone phototransduction
Arrestin 3 (cone arrestin) is a canonical cone photoreceptor marker involved in cone signal termination
OPN1LW encodes the long-wave-sensitive cone opsin, a definitive cone photoreceptor marker
Keratin 13 is a mucosal epithelial marker characteristic of conjunctival epithelium
Aquaporin 5 is a water channel expressed in conjunctival goblet and epithelial cells
Keratin 4 is a mucosal epithelial keratin expressed in conjunctival epithelium
Keratin 19 is a simple epithelial keratin marker of conjunctival cells
SLPI is a secretory leukocyte protease inhibitor expressed in mucosal epithelial cells including conjunctiva
S100A9 is an antimicrobial protein expressed in mucosal epithelial cells of the conjunctiva
Decorin is a proteoglycan abundantly expressed in corneal keratocytes/fibroblasts maintaining stromal structure
Apolipoprotein D is expressed in corneal stromal fibroblasts/keratocytes
Vimentin is a mesenchymal intermediate filament protein characteristic of fibroblasts
IGFBP5 is an IGF-binding protein expressed in corneal stromal fibroblasts
TIMP3 is a tissue inhibitor of metalloproteinases expressed by corneal keratocytes for ECM homeostasis
Alpha-crystallin A is the defining marker of this ciliary body cell subtype with high crystallin expression
Beta-crystallin B2 is co-expressed with CRYAA in this crystallin-high ciliary body subtype
ECM1 is an extracellular matrix glycoprotein enriched in this ciliary body cell subtype
HES5 is a Notch signaling target transcription factor marking progenitor-like ciliary body cells
Sarcolipin is a calcium regulatory protein expressed in ciliary body epithelial cells
CD74 (invariant chain) is involved in MHC class II antigen presentation and expressed on activated immune cells
CXCR4 is a chemokine receptor expressed on activated cytotoxic T cells mediating tissue homing
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II gene that can be expressed on highly activated T cells
MS4A1 (CD20) expression suggests B cell contamination or unusual T cell subset; included as a distinguishing marker in this cluster
SAMSN1 is an adaptor protein expressed in immune cells including cytotoxic lymphocytes
Keratin 3 is a canonical corneal epithelial differentiation marker
Keratin 12 is a cornea-specific keratin and definitive marker of corneal epithelial cells
MAL is a lipid raft protein expressed in differentiated corneal epithelial cells
ADIRF is an adipogenesis regulatory factor enriched in corneal epithelial cells
HES5 is a Notch target gene marking a specific corneal epithelial differentiation state
IGFBP5 is an IGF-binding protein highly expressed in fibroblasts regulating cell growth
Apolipoprotein D is a lipocalin family member enriched in fibroblasts
Fibulin 1 is an extracellular matrix glycoprotein produced by fibroblasts
SFRP4 is a Wnt signaling modulator expressed in stromal fibroblasts
Gelsolin is an actin-binding protein enriched in fibroblasts
Prostaglandin D2 synthase is expressed in ocular fibroblasts
ONECUT2 is a transcription factor essential for horizontal cell specification in the retina

GRIA4 is a glutamate receptor subunit enriched in horizontal cells mediating synaptic transmission

MEG3 is the defining long non-coding RNA for this fibroblast subtype
FOSB is an immediate early gene indicating transcriptional activation in this fibroblast subtype

Cyclin L1 is a transcription-associated cyclin enriched in this fibroblast subtype
PTGS2 (COX-2) is an inducible prostaglandin synthase marking activated fibroblasts

MLANA (Melan-A/MART-1) is a canonical melanocyte differentiation marker
MITF is the master transcription factor for melanocyte lineage specification and survival
Matrix Gla protein is the defining marker of this fibroblast subtype, involved in calcification regulation
IGFBP5 is an IGF-binding protein highly expressed in this fibroblast subtype
Decorin is a fibroblast ECM proteoglycan enriched in this subtype
ANGPTL7 is an angiopoietin-like protein expressed in trabecular meshwork and ocular fibroblasts
Prostaglandin D2 synthase is enriched in ocular fibroblasts
CCL3 (MIP-1α) is a chemokine highly expressed by activated microglia
CCL4 (MIP-1β) is a chemokine produced by activated microglia during neuroinflammation
SPP1 (osteopontin) is a marker of disease-associated microglia (DAM)
CD74 is an MHC class II-associated invariant chain expressed by antigen-presenting microglia
IL1B is a pro-inflammatory cytokine canonically produced by activated microglia
RGS1 is a regulator of G-protein signaling enriched in activated microglia
CCL3L3 is a chemokine ligand paralog highly expressed in microglia
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II gene highly expressed on monocytes for antigen presentation
CD74 is the MHC class II invariant chain, a canonical monocyte/macrophage marker
HLA-DPA1 is an MHC class II gene characteristic of professional antigen-presenting monocytes
S100A8 (calgranulin A) is a canonical monocyte marker forming the calprotectin complex
S100A9 (calgranulin B) is a canonical monocyte marker and calprotectin component
Serglycin is a proteoglycan highly expressed in myeloid cells including monocytes
HLA-DPB1 is an MHC class II gene enriched in monocytes
Glutamine synthetase (GLUL) is the canonical Müller glia marker essential for glutamate recycling in the retina
Clusterin is a glycoprotein highly expressed in Müller glial cells

HES1 is a Notch target transcription factor maintaining Müller glial cell identity
Transferrin is highly expressed in Müller glia for iron transport in the retina
Glutathione peroxidase 3 is an antioxidant enzyme enriched in Müller glia
CRABP1 is a retinoic acid binding protein expressed in Müller glia involved in retinoid metabolism
GRIK1 is a kainate-type glutamate receptor characteristic of OFF bipolar cells in the retina
GSG1 is a germ cell-associated gene that marks OFF bipolar cells in the retina
GRIA2 is an AMPA glutamate receptor subunit enriched in OFF bipolar cells
PCP4 is a calmodulin-binding protein expressed in retinal bipolar cells
CADPS is a calcium-dependent activator of secretion expressed in bipolar cells for neurotransmitter release
GRM6 (mGluR6) is the canonical ON bipolar cell metabotropic glutamate receptor essential for ON pathway signaling
PCP2 (L7) is a canonical marker of ON bipolar cells in the retina
TRPM1 is the transient receptor potential channel essential for ON bipolar cell light responses
GNG13 is a G-protein gamma subunit specifically expressed in ON bipolar cells
BCAT1 is a branched-chain amino acid aminotransferase enriched in ON bipolar cells
Dopachrome tautomerase marks pigmented cells including pigmented ciliary epithelium
PCP4 is a calmodulin-binding protein expressed in pigmented ciliary body cells
TFPI2 is a serine protease inhibitor enriched in pigmented ciliary body epithelium
PAX6 is a master eye transcription factor expressed in ciliary body epithelium
TRPM3 is a cation channel expressed in pigmented ciliary body cells
TFPI2 is a serine protease inhibitor highly expressed in putative ocular stem cells
FRZB is a Wnt antagonist associated with progenitor/stem cell populations
DCT expression suggests pigmented progenitor identity in these putative stem cells
GJA1 (Connexin 43) is a gap junction protein expressed in stem/progenitor cells
Clusterin is expressed in progenitor populations and may have cytoprotective roles
DAPL1 is enriched in pigmented epithelial progenitor cells of the eye
Synuclein gamma (SNCG) is a canonical retinal ganglion cell marker
Stathmin 2 is a neuronal marker highly expressed in retinal ganglion cells

Parvalbumin is a calcium-binding protein expressed in specific retinal ganglion cell subtypes
NDRG4 is a neuron-enriched gene expressed in retinal ganglion cells
RPL31 is a ribosomal protein gene defining this ribosomal-high fibroblast subtype
RPL17 is a ribosomal protein gene enriched in this high-translation fibroblast subtype
RPL39 is a ribosomal protein gene characteristic of this ribosomal-high fibroblast state
RPS8 is a small ribosomal subunit gene defining this high-ribosomal fibroblast population
RPL34 is a ribosomal protein gene enriched in this translationally active fibroblast subtype
PCP2 (L7) is a canonical rod bipolar cell marker with highest expression in this cell type
ISL1 is a LIM homeodomain transcription factor essential for rod bipolar cell development
GRM6 (mGluR6) is the metabotropic glutamate receptor for ON-type bipolar cells including rod bipolar cells

PDE6A is the rod-specific phosphodiesterase alpha subunit essential for rod phototransduction

S-antigen (rod arrestin) is a canonical rod photoreceptor marker involved in signal termination
PDE6G is the rod-specific phosphodiesterase gamma subunit in the phototransduction cascade
ROM1 is a rod outer segment membrane protein essential for disc morphogenesis
PLP1 (proteolipid protein 1) is a canonical myelin protein marker of Schwann cells
MPZ (myelin protein zero) is the major structural protein of peripheral nerve myelin and canonical Schwann cell marker

GPM6B is a glycoprotein expressed in myelinating glial cells including Schwann cells
ACTA2 (alpha smooth muscle actin) is the canonical smooth muscle cell marker
MYH11 (smooth muscle myosin heavy chain) is a definitive smooth muscle cell marker

Desmin is an intermediate filament protein characteristic of smooth muscle cells

Tropomyosin 1 is a contractile protein enriched in smooth muscle cells
TGFBI (keratoepithelin) is the defining marker of this corneal epithelial subtype, associated with corneal dystrophies
ALDH3A1 is a corneal crystallin and major soluble protein in corneal epithelium providing UV protection
COL17A1 is a hemidesmosomal collagen important for corneal epithelial adhesion
NQO1 is an antioxidant enzyme highly expressed in corneal epithelium
GJB6 (Connexin 30) is a gap junction protein expressed in corneal epithelial cells
Cathepsin V is a cysteine protease expressed in corneal epithelial cells
NSG2 is a neuronal vesicle-associated protein suggesting a neuronal identity for this cluster
SLC5A7 is the high-affinity choline transporter characteristic of cholinergic neurons
CD69 is an activation marker suggesting immune cell contribution to this mixed cluster
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed in NK and T cells
RIMS1 is a synaptic protein involved in neurotransmitter release
WIF1 (Wnt inhibitory factor 1) is the defining marker of this fibroblast subtype, a Wnt signaling antagonist
Myocilin is highly expressed in trabecular meshwork fibroblasts and associated with glaucoma
